# Cost Management Plan

## Purpose
Define how costs will be estimated, budgeted, controlled, and reported.

## Audience
Project Manager, Finance Partner, PMO, Sponsors.

## Inputs
- Cost baseline (`docs/templates/finance/cost-baseline-cross.xlsx`).
- Business case (`docs/templates/portfolio-program/business-case-template-cross-var3.md`).

## 1. Cost Estimation Methodology
Describe estimation techniques, assumptions, and data sources.

## 2. Budgeting & Cost Baseline
Explain how budgets are allocated and baselined.

## 3. Funding Requirements
Outline funding sources, release timing, and constraints.

## 4. Cost Control Methods
Describe earned value management (EVM) or other control methods.

## 5. Cost Change Control
Define approval thresholds, change request triggers, and reforecasting.

## 6. Reporting & Escalation Thresholds
Define reporting cadence, variance thresholds, and escalation paths.

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Cost estimation and baseline methodology documented.
- [ ] Funding requirements approved.
- [ ] Cost control and reporting thresholds defined.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Cost management plan supports governance reporting and change control.
- Baseline updates follow defined approval thresholds.
